title: Craftability
description:
just a mod that adds recipes and some very nice things

nothing is broken/op, for the newest mc updates.
body:
it is a balanced mod, nothing is broken/op, i will only make fabric mods, and for the newest mc updates.

added recipes:

- Iron horse armor
- Gold horse armor
- Diamond horse armor
- Saddle
- Name tag
- String
- Cobweb
- Trident
- all raw ore blocks (Iron, gold, copper) can be smelted/blasted
- Sand/Red sand can be blasted for glass
- Cactus can be blasted for dye
- Copper blocks can be aged
- Cobble can be blasted into stone
- Gravel can be smelted/blasted into flint
- Chainmail armor
- Crying obsidian

and last of all, Enchanted golden apple

Note: JEI is not required but recomended
